description: Epic 1 — Persistent Knowledge Capture and Tenant-Aware Memory. Complete all 6 remaining stories to a passing state with zero TypeScript errors and all tests green.

features.description: Record Raw Execution Traces — Schema + Kernel Routing
steps: Add evidence_ref (text, nullable) and confidence (float, default 1.0) columns to events table via migration
All trace writes route through RuVixKernel.syscall('trace') — not direct MCP inserts
Wire TraceMiddleware into agent execution paths
Run bun run typecheck — zero new errors
Run bun test — existing 42 tests in trace-middleware.test.ts all green
features.notes: trace-logger.ts already imports RuVixKernel. Events table exists but is missing evidence_ref and confidence columns. TraceMiddleware is implemented but unwired.

steps: Implement memory().createEntity({ label, props }) — wraps write(), auto-injects group_id
Implement memory().createRelationship({ from, to, type, props }) — wraps relate()
Implement memory().query(cypher, params) — wraps read()
Implement memory().search(term, group_id) — new: full-text search across Neo4j nodes
group_id is injected automatically from a required constructor param: memory(groupId)
Update all 24 existing writer tests to use new interface
Run bun run typecheck — zero errors
features.notes: writer.ts exists with write/relate/read interface. Tests exist in writer.test.ts. Need to rename methods and add group_id injection + search method.

steps: Approved events sync to Notion database (use mcp__MCP_DOCKER__notion tools)
Human review queue visible in Notion
Sync status (synced_at, notion_page_id) tracked in PostgreSQL events table or separate sync_log table
Run bun run typecheck — zero errors
features.notes: Notion MCP tools available via mcp__MCP_DOCKER__notion. Use existing knowledge-promotion.ts patterns for the promotion flow.

steps: CONTRIBUTED relationship created automatically when memory().createEntity() is called with an agent_id
Properties: timestamp (ISO8601), confidence (0.0-1.0), action (string)
Queryable by agent_id and time range via memory().query()
Unit tests cover relationship creation
Run bun run typecheck — zero errors
features.notes: Depends on Story 1.7 being complete first. Relationship schema documented in Story 1.4.

steps: LEARNED relationship created on session end (when event_type = 'session_end' logged)
Properties: timestamp (ISO8601), relevance_score (0.0-1.0)
Queryable by session_id and agent_id via memory().query()
Unit tests cover relationship creation
Run bun run typecheck — zero errors
features.notes: Depends on Story 1.7. Pairs with CONTRIBUTED — both are write-back relationship patterns.

steps: Mark story 1-1 as done
Mark story 1-2 as done
Mark story 1-5 as done
Mark story 1-6 as done
Mark story 1-7 as done
Mark epic-1 as done
Update last_updated date to today
features.notes: Final housekeeping story. Only run after all other stories pass.
